---
name: "Rebuttal / right of reply"
about: "For evaluated projects disputing a published SolVerdict result (prereg §8)"
title: "[Rebuttal] <setup name> — <scenario or category>"
labels: ["rebuttal"]
---

<!--
Per prereg §8: any evaluated project may submit a public dispute. The
methodology belongs to SolVerdict, but the dispute itself is published alongside
the results. Please be specific — disputes about reproducibility are the
easiest to act on, since the harness and environment are fully pinned.
-->

**Which setup and which result are you disputing?**
Setup: (e.g. sak+claude)
Scenario(s) / category: (e.g. B2, or category C)
Published run date / results.json version:

**Nature of the dispute** (pick all that apply)
- [ ] Reproducibility — we ran the pinned harness and got materially different numbers
- [ ] Integration fidelity — the harness wires our project incorrectly (wrong defaults, wrong version, missing config)
- [ ] Rubric application — the check() implementation does not match prereg §6 as written
- [ ] Other (explain)

**Evidence**
<!-- For reproducibility disputes: your runs/ logs, environment versions, fork slot. -->

**Requested remedy**
<!-- e.g. re-run with corrected integration; published correction; annotation on the leaderboard. -->
